nasb.text: They listened to him up to this statement, and then they raised their voices and said, “Away with such a fellow from the earth, for he should not be allowed to live!”

esv.text: Up to this word they listened to him. Then they raised their voices and said, “Away with such a fellow from the earth! For he should not be allowed to live.”

cnv.text: 眾人聽見他說到這句話，就高聲說：“這樣的人應該從地上除掉，不應該活著！”

ccb.text: 众人一听到这里，就高喊：“从世上除掉这样的人！他不配活着！”

csbs.text: 众人听保罗讲到这句话，就高声说：“这样的人，把他从地上除掉，因为他不该活着！”
